### `TRUTH IS IN THE PIXELS`

## **Aletheia** is a forensic-grade AI media detection platform that tells you whether an image, video, or audio file was generated by artificial intelligence — or captured in the real world.

<br/>



<br/>

## [**🔍 Live Demo**](https://aletheia-deepfake-tool.netlify.app/) · [**📖 Docs**](#-setup--installation)

## 🧠 Introduction

> *"Aletheia"* (ἀλήθεια) — Ancient Greek for **Truth** or **Disclosure**.

We live in a world where AI can generate hyper-realistic faces, deepfake videos, and cloned voices in seconds. Misinformation spreads faster than fact-checks. **Aletheia** exists to fight that.

Built for the **Google Solution Challenge 2025**, Aletheia is a multi-modal forensic AI detection tool that combines:

- 🔬 **SightEngine** — a computer vision API trained on millions of AI-generated vs. real images
- 🤖 **Google Gemini** — a multimodal LLM that performs deep forensic visual reasoning
- ⚡ A sleek, dark-mode web interface designed for speed, clarity, and trust

Whether you're a journalist verifying a news image, a researcher studying AI media, or just a curious user — Aletheia gives you a **verdict**, not just a score.

---

## ✨ Features

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  🖼️  IMAGE DETECTION    Upload or paste a URL — get a verdict   │
│  🎬  VIDEO DETECTION    Frame-by-frame AI pattern scanning      │
│  🎵  AUDIO DETECTION    Voice clone & synthetic audio analysis  │
│  🔗  URL ANALYSIS       Scan any public media link directly     │
│  📊  PROBABILITY SCALE  Visual real ↔ AI confidence meter       │
│  🏷️  GENERATOR ID        Detects DALL-E, Midjourney, SD & more  │
│  🔍  FORENSIC REPORT    Detailed technical breakdown per image  │
│  🕓  ANALYSIS HISTORY   Re-visit past scans in one click        │
│  🌐  DRAG & DROP UI     Just drop your file — no fuss           │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 🤖 AI Generator Detection
Aletheia can identify **18+ AI generators** including:

| Generator | Generator | Generator |
|-----------|-----------|-----------|
| DALL-E (OpenAI) | Midjourney | Stable Diffusion |
| Adobe Firefly | Google Imagen | Flux |
| Ideogram | Kling | GPT-4o / ChatGPT |
| Recraft | Seedream | Wan |
| Higgsfield | Qwen (Alibaba) | Reve |

## ⚙️ How It Works

```
User Uploads / Pastes URL
         │
         ▼
  ┌──────────────┐
  │  Frontend    │  HTML + CSS + Vanilla JS
  │  (Aletheia)  │  Drag-drop, preview, history
  └──────┬───────┘
         │  POST /api/analyze/upload (or /url)
         ▼
  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │              Node.js Backend                 │
  │                                              │
  │  ┌─────────────────┐  ┌──────────────────┐  │
  │  │  SightEngine    │  │  Google Gemini   │  │
  │  │  genai model    │  │  Visual Forensics│  │
  │  │  ai_generated % │  │  Multimodal LLM  │  │
  │  └────────┬────────┘  └────────┬─────────┘  │
  │           │                    │             │
  │           └────────┬───────────┘             │
  │                    │ mergeResults()           │
  │            ┌───────┴────────┐                │
  │            │  Blended Score │                │
  │            │  Verdict JSON  │                │
  │            └───────┬────────┘                │
  └────────────────────┼────────────────────────-┘
                       │
                       ▼
              Frontend renders:
              - Verdict (AI / Real / Uncertain)
              - AI Probability %
              - Confidence level
              - Estimated generator
              - AI Indicators (forensic signals)
              - Authentic Indicators
              - Technical detail paragraph
```

### Scoring Logic

| SightEngine Score | Weight | Effect |
|-------------------|--------|--------|
| ≥ 70% | 50% blend | Strong AI signal — overrides Gemini if it said "Real" |
| 40–70% | 30% blend | Moderate evidence |
| < 40% | 30% blend | Leans toward authentic |

---

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

**Frontend**
```
HTML5 · CSS3 (custom properties, animations) · Vanilla JavaScript
Fonts: Bebas Neue · DM Sans · IBM Plex Mono
```

**Backend**
```
Node.js · Express.js · Multer (file upload)
Axios · CORS · dotenv · express-rate-limit
```

**AI / APIs**
```
Google Gemini 2.5 Flash (+ fallback chain: 2.5 Flash Lite → 2.0 Flash → 2.0 Flash Lite)
SightEngine genai model (image AI detection + generator classification)
```

**Hosting**
```
Backend  → Render.com
Frontend → Netlify / GitHub Pages
```

---

## 🚀 Setup & Installation

### Prerequisites

```bash
node >= 18.x
npm >= 9.x
```

### 1. Clone the repository

```bash
git clone https://github.com/your-username/aletheia.git
cd aletheia
```

### 2. Install backend dependencies

```bash
npm install express cors multer axios dotenv @google/generative-ai form-data express-rate-limit
```

### 3. Configure environment variables

```bash
cp .env.example .env
```

Edit `.env`:

```env
SIGHTENGINE_API_USER=your_sightengine_user
SIGHTENGINE_API_SECRET=your_sightengine_secret
GEMINI_API_KEY=your_gemini_api_key
PORT=3001
```

> Get your keys:
> - SightEngine → [sightengine.com](https://sightengine.com)
> - Gemini → [Google AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey)

### 4. Run the backend

```bash
node server.js
```

You should see:

```
🔍 Aletheia backend running on http://localhost:3001
   SightEngine: ✓ configured
   Gemini:      ✓ configured
```

### 5. Open the frontend

Simply open `index.html` in your browser, or serve it locally:

```bash
npx serve .
```

---

## 📡 API Reference

### `GET /api/health`

Returns server status and API key availability.

```json
{
  "status": "ok",
  "apis": {
    "sightengine": true,
    "gemini": true
  }
}
```

---

### `POST /api/analyze/upload`

Analyze an uploaded image file.

**Request:** `multipart/form-data`
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `image` | File | JPEG, PNG, GIF, WEBP (max 20MB) |

**Response:**
```json
{
  "verdict": "ai",
  "aiProbability": 88,
  "confidence": "High",
  "estimatedGenerator": "Midjourney",
  "summary": "This image exhibits strong hallmarks of AI generation...",
  "aiIndicators": [
    { "name": "Skin Texture Smoothness", "severity": "High", "description": "..." }
  ],
  "realIndicators": [
    { "name": "Chromatic Aberration", "severity": "Low", "description": "..." }
  ],
  "technicalDetails": "SightEngine ai_generated: 0.91 | Top generator: Midjourney (87.3%)",
  "mediaType": "IMAGE"
}
```

---

### `POST /api/analyze/url`

Analyze a publicly accessible image URL.

**Request:** `application/json`
```json
{ "url": "https://example.com/image.jpg" }
```

**Response:** Same schema as `/upload`.

---

## 🏗️ Project Structure

```
aletheia/
├── index.html          # Main frontend UI
├── style.css           # All styles (dark theme, animations)
├── script.js           # Frontend logic (upload, results, history)
├── server.js           # Express backend (SightEngine + Gemini)
├── .env                # API keys (not committed)
├── .env.example        # Template
└── README.md
```

---

## 🔒 Security Notes

- URL analysis blocks private/internal IPs (`localhost`, `127.0.0.1`, `10.x`, `192.168.x`)
- Only `http://` and `https://` protocols are accepted for URL mode
- File uploads are validated by both extension and MIME type
- Rate limiting: 20 requests / minute on `/api/analyze/*`
- Files are processed in-memory — **nothing is stored on disk**

---
